rules.cash_live_promotion_requires: explicit operator approval, updated tests, rollback path, and decision record
rules.model_artifact_rule: artifact presence alone cannot approve, size up, route, or execute trades
rules.hard_block_precedence: broker, account, stale-data, market-hours, macro, explicit-symbol, and risk hard blockers dominate learned or model evidence

gates.freshness: runtime broker/account reads must be healthy for buys
gates.fallback: block buys when account or position data is degraded
gates.notes: Human-owned execution safety. No learned evidence may bypass it.

gates.freshness: generated_at should be recent enough for current operations; learner uses LOOKBACK_DAYS=20
gates.notes: Not a table. It summarizes recent closed trades and recent bar-pattern rows; it is not expected to train on all two-year candles.

gates.freshness: strategy_memory.json bar_pattern_rows and forward_outcome_rows should be populated
latest diagnostic must meet row, symbol, accuracy, and observe-only runtime-effect thresholds
gates.fallback: no model authority; deterministic policy continues
gates.notes: Ready diagnostics are evidence only unless separately promoted.

gates.freshness: latest diagnostic must meet row, symbol, accuracy, and observe-only runtime-effect thresholds
gates.notes: Known current risk: label-target filtering can leave triple_barrier_label undertrained even when candles exist.

gates.freshness: approved symbols should meet historical-bar readiness floors before automated completion hooks run
gates.fallback: coverage gaps block training completion hooks, not runtime trading safety
gates.notes: Cache completeness is separate from runtime authority.

gates.freshness: 60-second TTL; stale beyond TTLx2 fails open to no prediction
gates.fallback: no ML prediction; deterministic policy continues
gates.notes: Prediction scores cannot approve, increase size, or override broker/order safeguards.

gates.source: intelligence context, strategy_memory, policy artifacts, model evidence
gates.freshness: policy artifacts must be known-good and not stale before effect
gates.fallback: deterministic conservative policy; stale/missing artifacts cannot promote
gates.notes: Preferred consolidation surface for evidence-to-policy decisions.

gates.freshness: requires current paper outcomes and deterministic gates already passed
gates.notes: Must never apply in cash modes or override hard blockers.

gates.source: internal bar-derived candidates and paper-only evidence fields
gates.freshness: requires non-weak ML evidence and explicit paper-mode conditions
gates.notes: Cannot override weak ML, losing-pattern feedback, extreme chase, broker/account, stale-data, macro/regime, or cash-mode blockers.

gates.source: modeled slippage, residual fees, whole-share account constraints
gates.freshness: uses current sizing/account context and configured EV_AFTER_COST_MIN_PCT
gates.fallback: zero or cap size when EV after costs is insufficient
gates.notes: May reduce or zero size only; never approve or increase size.

gates.freshness: known-good pointer and state hash must be present for artifact effect
gates.notes: Rollback must not touch broker/order state.
